src: An orange tabby cat with ginger stripes, glossy coat, and sharp green eyes. It has a pink nose, prominent whiskers, and a balanced body.
edit: A marble statue of a cat, with cream and grey veins, showcasing polished textures. The eyes have detailed inlays, and the ears and facial features are crafted to mimic a real cat.

per_image_non_shared_src.melanie-andersen-4imykgmUTSs-unsplash: the animal is sitting, head tilted upward, eyes closed, basking in sunlight on a balcony with dense greenery in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.melanie-andersen-Agbtans6EUM-unsplash: The animal is nestled in a grey cocoon-style bed with its head and one paw outside, eyes open. Gray surroundings create a cozy indoor space.
per_image_non_shared_src.melanie-andersen-GqQ_hkOiUTE-unsplash: The animal is sprawled on colorful fabric with large eyes looking up, amidst swirling purple and red patterns contrasting with its orange fur.
per_image_non_shared_src.melanie-andersen-da0u7-jIVrc-unsplash: A sunbathing animal inside a white round container, eyes closed, one paw over the edge. Clay pots with purple flowers and a blue sky with bare branches are visible through a window in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.melanie-andersen-oncyUnQ4T6M-unsplash: The animal is in a close-up shot with its head resting against an edge, eyes striking, focus on the face, with a blurred outdoor background.

per_image_non_shared_edit.melanie-andersen-4imykgmUTSs-unsplash: The animal sits close up, head tilted upward, eyes closed, under moonlight. It's on a balcony with faded patterns, dense greenery in dark hues in the background, creating a mysterious, tranquil night setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.melanie-andersen-Agbtans6EUM-unsplash: The animal is partially nestled inside a dark cocoon-style bed with its head and one paw outside, illuminated by moonlight through a window. The indigo background and faint stars are visible, creating a serene night scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.melanie-andersen-GqQ_hkOiUTE-unsplash: The animal is sprawled on a fabric with dark purple and midnight blue patterns, under a starry night sky. Its large eyes reflect the moonlight, complementing its subdued orange fur, in a dreamy nocturnal atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.melanie-andersen-da0u7-jIVrc-unsplash: The animal rests under moonlight in a shadowy round container, eyes closed, a paw over the edge. Clay pots with indigo flowers create silhouettes. Through the window, a starry sky is visible with silhouetted branches.
per_image_non_shared_edit.melanie-andersen-oncyUnQ4T6M-unsplash: The animal, in close-up, rests its head against an edge, eyes glistening in moonlight. A distant streetlamp softly illuminates its face, set against a blurred nightscape with stars in the sky.
